sections.paragraph:
Original: צלצח

Transliteration: tseltsach

Phonetic: tsel-tsakh'

BDB Definition:

Zelzah = "shadow"
  1. a place on the boundary of Benjamin, close to Rachel's tomb, 5 miles (8 kilometers) southwest of Jerusalem

Origin: from H6738 and H6703

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
